final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: e-commerce announcement poster, 618 shopping festival campaign
Primary request: promotional poster for UGREEN NAS brand 618 anniversary sale
Scene/backdrop: clean digital stage with subtle tech grid pattern, floating geometric shapes suggesting data/cloud storage
Subject: UGREEN NAS (Network Attached Storage) device hero shot, sleek white/minimalist hardware design with subtle LED indicators
Style/medium: commercial product photography with 3D render elements, modern e-commerce aesthetic
Composition/framing: centered product hero shot with ample negative space for text overlay, 4:5 vertical format optimized for mobile shopping apps
Lighting/mood: soft studio lighting with subtle rim light on product, clean and trustworthy mood
Color palette: UGREEN brand green (#00B050) as accent + clean white background + subtle gray gradients + gold highlights for 618 celebration
Materials/textures: matte white plastic finish on NAS device, soft shadows, smooth gradient background
Text (verbatim): "绿联私有云品牌618周年庆活动电商宣布海报"
Constraints: keep product as clear focal point, maintain clean layout suitable for e-commerce platforms
Avoid: cluttered background, excessive decorative elements, distorted product proportions, watermark, busy patterns that compete with product
